title: Tangy Crispy Turkish Grape Nuts Stir-fry
description: A tangy and crunchy keto-friendly monsoon dish featuring grape nut cereal, seasoned with a savory-sweet sauce that adds just the right amount of zing.
instructions: Toast the grape nuts until lightly golden brown in a dry pan over medium heat.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add toasted grape nuts and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Add minced garlic and mint (if using) into the skillet and stir well to coat with oil and spread evenly.
Pour in lemon juice and honey. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally until the mixture begins to thicken and coats the grape nuts evenly.
Turn off heat immediately after the desired consistency is reached and serve hot as a snack or light meal.
